description_long: This is a large, contemporary school building with a striking, angular roof design featuring a repeating pattern of white and dark triangular segments. The structure is surrounded by extensive grounds, including a running track and multiple sports fields, indicating its use as an educational facility with athletic amenities. The main building has a complex, multi-faceted footprint with several wings and a prominent entrance plaza. Red accent panels are visible on some facades, adding visual interest and contrast to the predominantly white and gray exterior. The roof appears to be mostly flat with some sloped sections, and the building is set within a landscaped area with paved walkways and parking. The overall design is modern and geometric, likely constructed from concrete, steel, and glass.
description: A large, modern school building with a dramatic angular roof, red accent panels, and extensive athletic fields and grounds.
description_view_0: The view highlights the main entrance and the unique angular roof pattern, with the running track and sports fields clearly visible.
description_view_1: This angle emphasizes the red accent panels and the geometric complexity of the building's wings, with the entrance plaza in the foreground.
description_view_2: The rear of the building is shown, with the running track and sports fields dominating the view and the building's length visible.
description_view_3: A side view showing the building's depth, red accent panels, and the proximity to the running track and adjacent fields.
